source.update_note: 2025-26 season data from the Iowa DNR Hunting Seasons page (most recent published). 2026-27 season dates expected to be similar. License fees from Iowa DNR Hunting Licenses & Fees page.

sub_seasons.name: Youth Season
sub_seasons.note: Iowa residents only, age 15 and younger. 8am - 4:30pm shooting hours.

licenses.name: Resident Hunting / Habitat License
licenses.covers: Hunting license + habitat fee combined (required for all resident hunters)

licenses.name: Nonresident Hunting / Habitat License (age 18+)
licenses.covers: Hunting license + habitat fee combined for nonresidents

licenses.name: Nonresident 5-Day Hunting / Habitat License
licenses.covers: 5-day hunting license + habitat fee for nonresidents

licenses.name: Nonresident Hunting / Habitat License (under age 18)
licenses.covers: Youth hunting license + habitat fee for nonresidents

key_notes.title: All upland game bird hunters must wear at least one article of solid blaze orange (≥50% surface area) — hat, vest, coat, or similar outer garment.

sources.label: Iowa DNR — Pheasant Hunting
sources.evidence: Blaze orange required for upland game bird hunters: at least one article of visible external apparel with ≥50% solid blaze orange surface area.

key_notes.title: Pheasant shooting hours are 8:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Ruffed grouse shooting hours are sunrise to sunset.

sources.label: Iowa DNR — Hunting Seasons
sources.evidence: Pheasant: 8am - 4:30pm. Ruffed Grouse: Sunrise to Sunset. Quail & Partridge: 8am - 4:30pm.

key_notes.title: Only rooster (male) pheasants may be taken. A foot or fully feathered wing must remain attached for transport.

sources.label: Iowa DNR — Pheasant Hunting
sources.evidence: Individuals cannot transport a pheasant within the state without a foot or fully feathered wing attached. Rooster pheasant only.

key_notes.title: Youth pheasant season is open to Iowa residents only, age 15 and younger, with reduced bag limits (1 daily / 2 possession).

sources.label: Iowa DNR — Hunting Seasons
sources.evidence: Rooster Pheasant Youth (1/2 daily/poss): Oct 18-19. Iowa residents only, age 15 or younger.

key_notes.title: Annual hunting licenses and habitat fees expire on January 10 each year.

sources.label: Iowa DNR — Hunting Seasons
sources.evidence: Annual licenses, stamps, and fees expire on January 10.
